attributes.description: Alerts when any queries are blocked on Lock wait events. Direct blocking indicator.
attributes.name: [PostgreSQL OTel] Queries waiting on locks

investigation_guide.blob:
## PostgreSQL queries waiting on locks

### What fired
`wait_event_type=Lock` samples > 0 during the window.

### Why it matters
Queries blocked on lock waits experience latency directly proportional to the blocker's duration. Cascading blocking storms can take down an app.

### Triage
1. Find the blocker via `pg_stat_activity` / `pg_locks`.

### Remediation
- Kill or finish the blocker.
- Reduce transaction hold time.

### Tuning
- Fires on any blocked query.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM logs-postgresqlreceiver.otel-*
// Query samples with Lock wait event type indicate blocked queries
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.query_sample"
| WHERE attributes.postgresql.wait_event_type == "Lock"
| WHERE attributes.postgresql.wait_event != "" AND attributes.postgresql.wait_event IS NOT NULL
| STATS blocked_count = COUNT(*) BY service.instance.id, attributes.db.namespace
| WHERE blocked_count > 0
